case_title: VERONICA GOOD VS. COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,650.00 FILED BY GOOD, VERONICA AS TO DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-08-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOOD, VERONICA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE WAIVED) SERVED FEB-24-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP

DEPT. 506, SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR. 8, 2011, APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. AFTER HEARING, MATTER TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION BY JUDGE DON MITCHELL. CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. (NO EXHIBIT RETAINED)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-08-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOOD, VERONICA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
